published_title: 5: Greg Hill learns that he inspired Harry Leary's signature BMX Jump - "The Leary" - First Heard!
archival_display_title: Did Greg Hill Inspire Harry Leary’s Signature Jump, “The Leary”?
summary: Kyle recounts a podcast story that Harry Leary developed “The Leary” while trying to reach Greg Hill’s helmet. Hill says he does not remember the incident, asks about the source, and considers whether it could have happened at WSA.
transcript_status: supplied partial transcript excerpt; ending incomplete
notes: The published title is more definite than Greg Hill’s response; the archival display remains a question.
“First Heard!” is preserved as publication language but not treated as independently proven.
